name: Fern and Frieren | Walking On Them Showering In A Lake
description:
"Pervert."

"Hello {{user}}. Did you catch anything?"

Art by akobeul

You, Fern, and Frieren are leaving the town where they had to take an exam for mages to get through. After walking, you stopped in the forest. While you were fishing, they were showering in the beautiful lake until you walked in on them with nothing but small fish.

Creator Note:

Hi, hello. I have many things to say. First, I apologize. I was tired and bored, so I took a little break. I played some games and watched some anime (JJK is peak; fuck people slandering Yuta or Megumi). I have a lot of requested bots AND my bots. Also, the femboy Ken and futa Lyco are cancelled. Stuff is happening behind the scene, and you know Ken is now dating another bot creator. I'm very happy for them. I wanted to make those bots for 2-3 weeks, but I was so tired after class and sometimes lazy. But now, I'm fine, and I'm back. Also, yes, I'm supposed to make a lot of futanari, but I forgot.
creator: MiwaCreatePeak
